headlines.description: Second-half goals from Diogo Jota and Mohamed Salah allowed new Liverpool coach Arne Slot to get off to a 2-0 winning start at newly promoted Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah strikes as Slot opens Liverpool era with win

headlines.description: Arsenal eased to a 2-0 win at home to Wolverhampton Wanderers, with goals by Kai Havertz and Bukayo Saka getting their latest Premier League title challenge up and running on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saka, Havertz goals start Arsenal title tilt with win

headlines.description: Danny Welbeck scored one goal and set up another as Brighton & Hove Albion eased to a 3-0 victory over a Everton on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton win as Milner starts record 23rd season

headlines.description: Joelinton's goal earned Newcastle a 1-0 win over promoted Southampton in their first game of the Premier League season at St James' Park, despite going down to 10 men in the first half.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ten-man Newcastle down Southampton in opener

headlines.description: Bournemouth forward Antoine Semenyo rescued a point for his side with a late equaliser as they drew 1-1 at Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Saturday in a game marred by a serious-looking injury to Forest's Brazilian midfielder Danilo.
headlines.shortLinkText: Forest-Bournemouth draw marred by Danilo injury

events.name: Aston Villa at West Ham United

headlines.description: Amadou Onana scored four minutes into his Aston Villa debut and Jhon Duran netted the late winner as Unai Emery's men kicked off their Premier League season with a 2-1 victory at West Ham United on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Onana, Duran earn Villa win against West Ham
